name: A THOUSAND MOUTHS TO SCREAM
short_description: Psychological Body Horror visual novel in a space setting with different endings depending on your actions.
detailed_description:
A THOUSAND MOUTHS TO SCREAM is a space horror visual novel with interactive point and click elements.

You will observe the life of Nick the only crew member of an intelligent spaceship.
This ship has everything it needs to keep itself and its crew alive.
The ship feeds, treats Nick, makes sure he's well.
It's a choose-your-own-adventure style game. You will have to make choices and see the consequences.

The interaction with the game is in the spirit of point and click games.
You can move around the ship, explore its interiors, interact with various objects.
Your actions will affect the ending you get.

Features:
- An interactive point-and-click environment.
- Atmospheric retro graphics.
- A short experience that can be completed in one sitting.
- The game has multiple endings.
